description: This Java source file defines the 'LoanApplicationDraft' entity class used in a Spring Boot application. It models a loan application draft persisted in a database, with fields for user data, versioning, timestamps, and status information. The class includes annotations for ORM mapping with JPA/Hibernate, indicating table and column configurations. It supports multi-step wizard saves and stores JSON payloads as strings for flexible data handling.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraft
classes.description: Entity class representing a loan application draft with persistence annotations, capturing user data, status, timestamps, and versioning for concurrency control.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the unique identifier of the loan application draft.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Sets the unique identifier of the loan application draft.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Returns the user ID associated with this draft.

methods.name: setUserId
methods.description: Sets the user ID associated with this draft.

methods.name: getData
methods.description: Returns the JSON payload representing the draft state.

methods.name: setData
methods.description: Sets the JSON payload representing the draft state.

methods.name: getSectionStatus
methods.description: Returns the section status map as a JSON string.

methods.name: setSectionStatus
methods.description: Sets the section status map as a JSON string.

methods.name: getCurrentStep
methods.description: Returns the current step in the application process.

methods.name: setCurrentStep
methods.description: Sets the current step in the application process.

methods.name: getStatus
methods.description: Returns the overall status of the draft.

methods.name: setStatus
methods.description: Sets the overall status of the draft.

methods.name: getVersion
methods.description: Returns the version number for concurrency control.

methods.name: setVersion
methods.description: Sets the version number for concurrency control.

methods.name: getCreatedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the draft was created.

methods.name: setCreatedAt
methods.description: Sets the timestamp when the draft was created.

methods.name: getUpdatedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp of the last update to the draft.

methods.name: setUpdatedAt
methods.description: Sets the timestamp of the last update to the draft.
